inputs.titre: Prise de Sirmium par les Huns

reason: The image depicts a group of warriors, presumably Huns, based on their appearance and armor style. They are wearing helmets and armor that seem plausible for the era, though the level of detail and artistry in the armor could be slightly exaggerated. The hairstyles and facial features are also consistent with what one might expect from Hunnic warriors. The background shows a building that resembles architecture of the Roman era. The level of detail and sharpness could indicate a modern image editing software, but overall the image seems to align with the general historical context of the Siege of Sirmium.
